<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Save account connector field"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/accounts/{account_id}/oauth2/connectors/{connector_id}/fields/{field_name}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Create or replace a configured field for an account Data Source connector.
